# AI Integrity
> Practical AI implementation for regulated UK professional services firms.

## What AI Integrity Is
AI Integrity (ai-integ.com) is a peer-led community for high street and regional professional services firms implementing AI. It covers solicitors, accountants, financial advisers (IFAs), architects, surveyors, and consultants — firms with 3 to 100 professionals.

## What We Provide
- A Skool-based community for regulated professionals sharing AI implementation experience
- The Crawl-Walk-Run-Fly implementation framework for staged AI adoption
- Sector-specific compliance guidance aligned to SRA, FCA, ICO, ICAEW, ACCA, ARB, RIBA, and RICS
- Policy templates: AI usage policies, client disclosure clauses, staff guidance
- A vetted tool library where every tool is reviewed for regulatory compliance implications
- Monthly implementation calls with recordings
- Direct access to the authors of The Digital Law Firm (Law Society Publishing, Q4 2026)

## Pricing
- Community tier: Free — peer Q&A, tool library, basic templates
- Member tier: £49/month — full course library, compliance template pack, author Q&A
- Firm tier: £299/month — 5 seats, quarterly strategy call, bespoke tool review

## Relationship to ASIMOV-AI
AI Integrity is the community entry point. ASIMOV-AI (asimov-ai.org) provides formal AI governance audits using a 251-control framework and Three Lines of Defence model. Firms that need board-level sign-off or EU AI Act compliance evidence are referred to ASIMOV-AI.

## Methodology
Based on the ASIMOV 251-control AI audit framework, adapted for SME professional services. The Crawl-Walk-Run-Fly maturity model maps implementation phases. The Three Lines of Defence model (L1 Delivery, L2 ASIMOV Risk/Governance, L3 Audit/Assurance) structures governance.

- Sushila Nair — CISSP, Independent Cybersecurity Adviser
